scripts.server:create: git clone --depth 1 https://github.com/spree/spree-starter.git server && rm -rf server/.git server/.gitignore && printf 'SPREE_PATH=..\nSECRET_KEY_BASE=%s\n' "$(openssl rand -hex 64)" > server/.env
scripts.server:start: SPREE_PATH=$PWD docker compose -f server/docker-compose.dev.yml -f scripts/docker-compose.edge.yml up -d --force-recreate web worker
scripts.server:stop: SPREE_PATH=$PWD docker compose -f server/docker-compose.dev.yml -f scripts/docker-compose.edge.yml down
